headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Synchrony Financial, Raises Price Target to $90
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Moshe Orenbuch   maintains Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) with a Buy and raises the price target from $89 to $90.

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Synchrony Financial, Raises Price Target to $84
summary: UBS  analyst Erika Najarian   maintains Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $77 to $84.
